'''Nichen''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] found in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. ''[[Kettemoor]]'' [[Hyperspace/Legends|jumped]] to this location after its encounter with the [[Teljkon Vagabond]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the [[Nichen system/Legends|Nichen system]], and therefore the planet Nichen, in grid square N-4.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]] repeated that information on the [[Star system/Legends|system's]] location. However, the document also placed the system within the [[Morshdine sector/Legends|Morshdine sector]], which it depicted as lying in grid squares O-4 and O-5 only, with other systems assigned to that [[Sector/Legends|sector]] being placed strictly within those two squares.<ref name="EAOC" />
